case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. AMERICAN SURETY COMPANY

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN SURETY COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

calendar.matters:
Motion To Set Aside Summary Judgment, Discharge Forfeiture And Exonerate Bail
Off Calendar May-17-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Erin Crane of Law Office of John Rorabaugh telephone number 415-412-8728 for Defendants American Surety Co. and Bail Hotline Bail Bonds.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT AMERICAN SURETY COMPANY'S Motion To Set Aside Summary Judgment, Discharge Forfeiture And Exonerate Bail is Granted. No oppositon filed and good cause shown. Bail will be exonerated and $40,450 refunded to Bail HotLine Bail Bonds. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Richard Ulmer. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Summary Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-18-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Terry Szucsko of Lvovich & Szucsko P.C. telephone number 415-392-2560 for the Defendant in the criminal action and specially appearing for Attorney Matthew Singer.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

Mr. Szucsko requested on behalf of his Client that the summary judgment be set aside, informed the Court that a motion to extend the bail bond is set for April 21, 2016 in the criminal matter and stated that the City Attorney was served on April 11, 2016. The Court informed Counsel that he needs to contact the City Attorney and ask if they will stipulate to setting aside the summary judgment. If there is no agreement, Counsel can come in ex parte on Wednesday with 25 hours notice. REAL PARTY IN INTEREST THE BAIL HOTLINE BAIL BONDS' Motion To Set Aside Summary Judgment is off calendar. Not filed and served in compliance with CCP 1005.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
